caption: The video appears to be a presentation on the MOJITO (Multi-site OPS-5G Joint Independent Test Option) initiative, which focuses on connecting DoD 5G and OPS-5G technologies. The presenter, visible in a small window on the top right corner, explains the collaborative process involving DARPA, the GOV Team, and The Linux Foundation. DARPA is involved in developing secure open-source software for OPS-5G, while the GOV Team works on the OPS-5G ITE (Independent Test Environment). The Linux Foundation contributes by providing a secure 5G stack. The diagram illustrates how these entities work together to enhance 5G core security across various sites within the DoD 5G-to-XG Initiative and OPS-5G ITE sites. The GOV Team also handles the design, procurement, coordination, and management of the MOJITO project. The presentation emphasizes the importance of collaboration and integration in advancing 5G technology for secure and efficient communication networks.
